sample.description: PHerc 358 is a rolled Herculaneum papyrus from the Biblioteca Nazionale di Napoli, carbonized during the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD. It was scanned at the ESRF (European Synchrotron Radiation Facility) in Grenoble, France.
